creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-26 16:36:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/roundcube-umich Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/roundcube-umich/files patch-default-preview 
  Log:
  While deploying RoundCube at the University of Michigan was developed a new
  skin. It is a modern, open interface with tools and actions arranged with
  optimal usability in mind. Light color blocks and borders delineate application
  areas without drawing too much attention or drawing focus away from the
  content.
  
  WWW: http://www.roundcubeforum.net
  
  PR:             ports/138161
  Submitted by:   Alexey V. Degtyarev
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.969     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +38 -0     ports/mail/roundcube-umich/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/roundcube-umich/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/mail/roundcube-umich/files/patch-default-preview (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/mail/roundcube-umich/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +262 -0    ports/mail/roundcube-umich/pkg-plist (new)
